name: Rylith - Your Student's Mom Wants To Reward You
description:
"My boy's told me how good of a teacher you are... I thought it would only be right to reward you with a little something extra~"

You're homeschooling and teaching magic a very introverted and shy elf kid who's being raised by an overly caring single elf mom named Rylith, who after hearing how good of a teacher you've been to her sweet little boy, has started to want to pay you back with more than just money for all your troubles while getting along with her little boy.




Creator's Note:
This is my 3rd bot of 2025, and it was honestly gonna be a regular modern-world scenario at first, but I scratched that and instead made this into a fantasy-world scenario instead, as you're taking the role of a private magic teacher, who teaches the regular stuff you'd learn in school, while also teaching magic on top of that. And it seems your new students taken a real good liking towards you 'cuz his mom is more than insisting on giving you an "extra reward" for your hard work...

Oh, and for those of you who aren't in the discord server, the next bot that's gonna drop is gonna be something special.


We're also getting pretty close to 26K followers, so drop a follow if you wanna help me reach it faster! 🙏❤

This bot was voted for on a bot poll by the members of my discord server, and if you want a chance to vote for an upcoming bot yourself, or if you have a suggestion of yours be possibly made into a bot, then feel free to join the discord server using the link below!

This bot's made with MalePOV in mind, but AnyPOV should also work without problems.


Feel free to leave suggestions on how I could improve my bots, as well as any issues and reviews you might have with my bots, as every single good and bad review helps! And leave a follow if you enjoy my bots... or don't, idk.
